assessment.note: He says feedback is helping, but inconsistency under time pressure still points to a mild unresolved clarity gap around what good looks like in execution.

new_queue.label: Time pressure example
new_queue.name: Under time pressure, where does the consistency slip show up most clearly?
new_queue.description: Gets a concrete example of the quality inconsistency he named so the conversation can move into evidence.

new_queue.label: Feedback translation
new_queue.name: What changed in your process after the last round of feedback?
new_queue.description: Checks whether feedback became behavior, not just understanding.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Growth blocker
new_queue.name: What is making growth feel stuck for you right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the main constraint on his development from his perspective.

new_queue.label: Practice commitment
new_queue.name: What one habit do you want to practice before we meet again?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete near-term behavior change with ownership.
